description.unified: Deals Magic DMG 7 times to nearby enemies within a circular area. Then deals Magic DMG to enemies in a frontal area and inflicts Down for 1.5sec.

Deals Magic DMG to all enemies and inflicts Stun for 0.5sec. Upon casting, enters [Arcane Crystal Awakening] for 10sec, increasing the ATK Spd of all allies by [15%->35% Kirze only]. While active, releases a shockwave every 1.3sec, dealing Magic DMG to nearby enemies.

Summons an Arcane Crystal to deal Magic DMG to enemies in a frontal straight-line area, then causes an explosion shortly afterward that deals additional Magic DMG. Enemies hit are inflicted with [Arcane Crystal Curse] for 5 sec, reducing their ATK Spd by 10%. When Kirze attacks enemies affected by [Arcane Crystal Curse], applies a stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy]. After 5 sec, [Arcane Crystal Curse] explodes, dealing Magic DMG plus an additional 43% of ATK M.DMG per stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy], and resets all [Arcane Crystal Energy] stacks.
Changes base Mana Recovery per sec to 150, increases Crit Chance by [250->150], and increases the duration of CCs that all allies inflict on Bosses by [15%->20%].

light.unified: [Arcane Crystal Awakening] [(removed) Increases Mana Cost by 1000 but] Increases duration by 4 sec.

dark.unified: [Arcane Crystal Awakening] While active, increases Kirze’s ATK Spd by [35%->40%].

description.unified: [Slash, Blade of Judgment!] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Mana Cost by [1000->1].
[Disperse, Crystal Haze!] increases ATK Spd by an additional [(added) {0} -> (removed) 10% all allies] and increases DEF Penetration of all allies by [???->100].
[End to Evil Deeds!] Increases [(added) Crit Chance by 250 -> (removed) Crit DMG by 32%] and [(added) additionally] increases CC duration increase effect by {0}%.
